subject: Sample Data import step to relion
body:
Hi,
I'm trying to use the samle data on warp to learn how to use it. I managed 
to arrive at the step I need to use the .star file into relion but when I 
try to to either InitialModel or Refine3D job. I have this error:
ERROR: 
BUG: cannot find name for particle...

I'm using relion 4.0.1 and warp 2.0

Thank you,

Alejandro Villalta
